frozen_native_action_manifests.command: sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS.txt in each frozen package

external_frozen_verifier_attempt.reason: The verifier correctly requires a dedicated virtual environment and refused the system interpreter because /usr/pyvenv.cfg was absent.
external_frozen_verifier_attempt.effect: No frozen package was modified. Internal manifests were replayed separately. The previously banked pinned-environment 24/24 CAS result is not claimed as freshly rerun here.

original_workstation_checkout.inspection: git status metadata only; file contents unread
